name: Spinach, Turkey and Feta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red bell pepper, cut into 1/4" strips
1 medium Yellow bell pepper, cut into 1/4" strips
1/2 cup Calamata olives, pitted and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peppers, onion and turkey cubes in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together vinegar, garlic, oregano, sugar, pepper, olive oil and salt until blended.
3. Pour the dressing over the turkey mixture. Add spinach and gently toss to mix.
4. Finely crumble feta into salad; top with olives.
